parsed_output.justification: The transcript shows that the Copycat (doppelganger) awakens first and copies a center card.  During the early dialogue, a player—who declares “That was my role” and repeatedly claims that other players are not being tailed—appears to be the Copycat.  If that card was a Werewolf, this Copycat would finish the night as a Werewolf, and no other player exhibits convincing evidence of having become one.  Consequently, the most plausible culprit among the five is the Copycat, who is Justin.
